definition.title: Hello America's Truck Drivers (Foundational Founder Address)
definition.objective: Content gold mine. From this one script: 50+ micro clips and 100+ quote graphics. Can fuel 2-3 posts per week for 2-3 months without repeating ideas. Tone guardrail: Keep bold confidence, big vision, respect tone.
definition.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary), carriers, brokers, investors, policymakers, LinkedIn professionals, general public
definition.cadence: Evergreen foundational. Can anchor an entire quarter. Deploy 2-3 posts per week. Mix across platforms.

campaign_card.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary), carriers, brokers, investors, policymakers, LinkedIn professionals, general public
campaign_card.campaign_name: Hello America's Truck Drivers (Foundational Founder Address)
key_messages: Narrative DNA of Line Haul Station — the most important archive piece
50+ micro clips and 100+ quote graphics from one script
Founder myth-building, driver appeal, infrastructure thesis, and cultural manifesto in one asset

_legacy_card.description: The original LHS launch video and arguably the most important narrative piece in the entire archive. Narrative DNA of Line Haul Station. Contains origin story, emotional driver respect language, core infrastructure thesis, membership explanation, relay economics, investor pitch logic, national transformation framing.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Content gold mine. From this one script: 50+ micro clips and 100+ quote graphics. Can fuel 2-3 posts per week for 2-3 months without repeating ideas. Tone guardrail: Keep bold confidence, big vision, respect tone.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: 1970s trucking nostalgia. Driver dignity and respect. The Rig Carlton. Modern-Day Pony Express. Relay productivity math. $40B industry impact. Sustainability. Driver lifestyle revolution. Shared infrastructure. Carrier/broker value prop. Investor thesis.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Zero for script mining, quote graphics, and text-based repurposing.
_legacy_card.repurposing: 50+ micro video clips. 100+ quote graphics. LinkedIn series (Driver Dignity, Infrastructure Economics, Asset Utilization, Sustainability, Investor Thesis, Shared Infrastructure). Carousel series. Founder Library pillar.
_legacy_card.timeline: Evergreen foundational. Can anchor an entire quarter. Deploy 2-3 posts per week. Mix across platforms.
